identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.core_philosophy: Sterile Precision meets Bioluminescent Warmth. A dark-mode-first experience that reduces eye strain for night-shift staff while offering comforting clarity for anxious patients.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, modal headers, and department names. Tracking tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all interface text, labels, and data tables. High legibility at small sizes.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, Modal overlays, Toast notifications

borders.tracing_beam: Use a moving gradient border for active states or selected items.

landing_page.description: Left side: Immersive 3D/Abstract medical art with 'Hero Glow'. Right side: Functional Role Selection.

patient_dashboard.description: Department cards vary in size. 'Cardiology' and 'Neurology' are Hero cards (col-span-2). Others are standard.

doctor_admin_dashboard.description: High density. Sticky headers. Alternating row colors for tables. 100% width utilization.

RoleSelector.style: Large vertical cards with glass effect. Hovering expands the card slightly and reveals a 'Enter Portal' button.
RoleSelector.icon_strategy: Use large, thin Lucide icons (User, Stethoscope, Shield).

DepartmentCard.style: Minimalist container. Icon top-left. Title bottom-left. Subtle gradient overlay on hover.
DepartmentCard.interaction: Scale 1.02 on hover. Border color shifts to Primary.

BookingCalendar.customization: Remove rounded corners. Use slate-900 background. Selected date = Primary Color glow.

AppointmentTable.customization: Header: Uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xs, text-muted-foreground. Rows: Hover bg-slate-800/50.

hero_background.usage: Landing page background with heavy dark overlay (bg-slate-950/90)

abstract_textures.usage: Subtle background texture for 'Neurology' department card
Subtle background texture for 'Orthopedics' department card

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px. Color: Text-Main or Primary.

transitions.page_load: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided Tailwind Config Extension colors (convert HSL values to CSS variables).
3. CREATE the 'RoleSelector' as the entry point (Landing Page).
4. USE the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Patient Dashboard department selection.
5. ENSURE all text has sufficient contrast against the dark slate background.
6. DO NOT use standard blue links. Use the Primary Teal for interactive text.
7. MOCK DATA: Create a robust mock data file for Doctors and Departments since there is no backend yet.
8. USE 'sonner' for all booking confirmation toasts.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
